tripOverview.intro: San Juan enchants with its colorful colonial architecture, pristine beaches, and vibrant culture perfect for romantic getaways. This Caribbean paradise offers world-class dining, historic charm, and stunning oceanfront experiences.
tripOverview.vibe: A perfect blend of romance, culture, and beach relaxation with LGBTQ+-friendly venues throughout historic and modern San Juan.

destinationOverview.bestTime: April is ideal with warm, dry weather perfect for beaches and outdoor activities.

attractions.name: Old San Juan
attractions.desc: Historic colonial district with colorful buildings and cobblestone streets.

attractions.name: El Yunque Rainforest
attractions.desc: Tropical rainforest with waterfalls and hiking trails.

attractions.name: Condado Beach
attractions.desc: Popular beach with golden sand and clear waters.

attractions.name: Camuy Caves
attractions.desc: Underground cave system with guided tours.

destinationOverview.transportation: Public buses (AMA) connect major areas for $0.75 per ride, though service can be irregular. Taxis and Uber are widely available, with rides around the metro area costing $8-20. Rental cars offer the most flexibility for exploring beyond San Juan, with daily rates around $35-50.
destinationOverview.tip: Download the Uber app as it's more reliable than taxis, and consider renting a car if you plan to visit El Yunque or other areas outside San Juan.
destinationOverview.safety: San Juan is generally safe for tourists, but avoid walking alone at night in less touristy areas and keep valuables secure.
destinationOverview.airaloText: Stay connected with affordable eSIM data plans that work seamlessly across Puerto Rico without roaming charges.

days.intro: Start your romantic Puerto Rican adventure exploring the colorful colonial charm of Old San Juan.

morning.name: Arrive in San Juan
morning.desc: Land at Luis Muñoz Marín International Airport and transfer to hotel.

morning.name: Hotel Check-in
morning.desc: Settle into your accommodation and freshen up.

afternoon.name: Caficultura Coffee Tour
afternoon.desc: Learn about Puerto Rican coffee culture with tastings.

afternoon.name: Old San Juan Stroll
afternoon.desc: Walk the colorful cobblestone streets and colonial architecture.

afternoon.name: El Morro Fort
afternoon.desc: Explore the historic 16th-century fortress overlooking the ocean.

evening.name: Dinner at Marmalade
evening.desc: Fine dining with creative international cuisine in a romantic setting.

evening.name: Cocktails at La Placita
evening.desc: Experience the vibrant nightlife at this popular plaza.

days.tip: Exchange money isn't needed since Puerto Rico uses USD, but bring small bills for tips and street vendors.

days.intro: Soak up the Caribbean sun at San Juan's most beautiful beaches with your loved one.

morning.name: Breakfast at Panadería España
morning.desc: Traditional Puerto Rican bakery with fresh pastries and coffee.

morning.name: Condado Beach
morning.desc: Relax on golden sand with crystal-clear waters and beachfront amenities.

afternoon.name: Beach Lunch at Oceano
afternoon.desc: Oceanfront dining with fresh seafood and vegetarian options.

afternoon.name: Water Sports Rental
afternoon.desc: Rent paddleboards or kayaks for romantic water adventures.

afternoon.name: Isla Verde Beach
afternoon.desc: Continue beach hopping at this pristine stretch of sand.

evening.name: Sunset at El Escambrón
evening.desc: Watch the sunset from this protected beach cove.

evening.name: Dinner at Casita Miramar
evening.desc: Farm-to-table restaurant with excellent vegetarian options.

evening.name: Gelato at Ice Cream Spot
evening.desc: Cool tropical gelato flavors for a sweet ending.

days.tip: Bring reef-safe sunscreen to protect the coral reefs and your skin from the strong Caribbean sun.

days.intro: Dive deep into Puerto Rican art, music, and cultural heritage in the heart of San Juan.

morning.name: Coffee at Café Con Leche
morning.desc: Local favorite serving traditional Puerto Rican coffee preparations.

morning.name: Museo de Arte de Puerto Rico
morning.desc: Explore Puerto Rican art from colonial times to contemporary works.

afternoon.name: Lunch at Verde Mesa
afternoon.desc: Vegetarian-friendly restaurant focusing on local organic ingredients.

afternoon.name: Casa Bacardí Tour
afternoon.desc: Learn about rum-making history with tastings (mocktails available).

afternoon.name: Santurce Street Art Walk
afternoon.desc: Explore vibrant murals and street art in the artistic Santurce district.

evening.name: La Placita de Santurce
evening.desc: Experience local culture at this bustling market square.

evening.name: Dinner at Santaella
evening.desc: Modern Puerto Rican cuisine with creative vegetarian dishes.

evening.name: Live Music at Nuyorican Café
evening.desc: Intimate venue featuring local musicians and cultural performances.

days.tip: Many museums offer discounts for students and seniors, and some have free admission on certain days of the week.

days.intro: Embark on an exciting journey to El Yunque, the only tropical rainforest in the US National Forest System.

morning.name: Early Breakfast at Hotel
morning.desc: Fuel up with a hearty breakfast before your rainforest adventure.

morning.name: El Yunque Rainforest Tour
morning.desc: Guided tour including waterfalls, hiking trails, and tropical wildlife viewing.

afternoon.name: Picnic Lunch in Rainforest
afternoon.desc: Enjoy packed vegetarian lunch surrounded by tropical nature.

afternoon.name: La Mina Waterfall Hike
afternoon.desc: Moderate hike to beautiful waterfall with swimming opportunity.

afternoon.name: Yokahu Tower Visit
afternoon.desc: Climb observation tower for panoramic rainforest views.

evening.name: Return to San Juan
evening.desc: Relaxing drive back to the city with scenic mountain views.

evening.name: Casual Dinner at Lote 23
evening.desc: Food truck park with diverse vegetarian-friendly options.

evening.name: Rest at Hotel
evening.desc: Recover from adventure day with some quiet couple time.

days.tip: Wear comfortable hiking shoes and bring insect repellent - the rainforest can be muddy and buggy but incredibly rewarding.

days.intro: Indulge in couples activities and romantic experiences across San Juan's most enchanting locations.

morning.name: Couples Spa Treatment
morning.desc: Relaxing massage and wellness treatments at a luxury spa.

morning.name: Coffee Tasting at Hacienda San Pedro
morning.desc: Private coffee tasting experience learning about local beans.

afternoon.name: Romantic Lunch at 1919
afternoon.desc: Upscale oceanfront dining with spectacular views and vegetarian options.

afternoon.name: Paseo de la Princesa
afternoon.desc: Romantic waterfront promenade walk with harbor views.

afternoon.name: Couples Photography Session
afternoon.desc: Professional photos at Old San Juan's most photogenic spots.

evening.name: Sunset Catamaran Cruise
evening.desc: Romantic sailing experience with complimentary drinks and snacks.

evening.name: Dinner at Pikayo
evening.desc: Celebrity chef restaurant with innovative Puerto Rican fusion cuisine.

evening.name: Nightcap at Jungle Bird
evening.desc: Intimate tiki bar with craft cocktails and romantic ambiance.

days.tip: Book spa treatments and fine dining restaurants in advance, especially during peak season when romantic spots fill up quickly.

days.intro: Venture beyond San Juan to discover hidden beaches and underground wonders on a full day of exploration.

morning.name: Rental Car Pickup
morning.desc: Collect rental car for day trip to western Puerto Rico.

morning.name: Drive to Camuy Caves
morning.desc: Scenic 1.5-hour drive through Puerto Rico's countryside.

afternoon.name: Camuy Caves Tour
afternoon.desc: Explore underground cave system with stunning limestone formations.

afternoon.name: Lunch in Arecibo
afternoon.desc: Local restaurant stop with traditional Puerto Rican vegetarian dishes.

afternoon.name: Arecibo Observatory Visit
afternoon.desc: Former world's largest radio telescope with science exhibits.

afternoon.name: Cambalache Forest
afternoon.desc: Short nature walk through subtropical dry forest.

evening.name: Return Drive to San Juan
evening.desc: Relaxing drive back to the city as the sun sets.

evening.name: Dinner at José Enrique
evening.desc: Renowned local chef's restaurant with farm-to-table philosophy.

evening.name: Return Rental Car
evening.desc: Drop off rental car and return to hotel.

days.tip: Fill up the gas tank before returning the rental car and keep toll change handy for highway travel.

days.intro: Enjoy a leisurely final full day with beach time, shopping, and favorite spots before departure.

morning.name: Brunch at Café Berlin
morning.desc: European-style café with excellent vegetarian breakfast options.

morning.name: Ocean Park Beach
morning.desc: Quieter beach perfect for relaxing and swimming.

afternoon.name: Light Lunch at Pinky's
afternoon.desc: West End ice cream shop with healthy bowls and smoothies.

afternoon.name: Shopping at Plaza Las Américas
afternoon.desc: Caribbean's largest shopping mall for souvenirs and gifts.

afternoon.name: Final Beach Time
afternoon.desc: Return to your favorite beach for last-minute relaxation.

evening.name: Farewell Sunset
evening.desc: Watch your final Puerto Rican sunset from Paseo de la Princesa.

evening.name: Farewell Dinner at Budatai
evening.desc: Asian-Latin fusion with creative vegetarian options.

evening.name: Final Night Stroll
evening.desc: Romantic walk through illuminated Old San Juan streets.

days.tip: Pack souvenirs carefully in checked luggage and save room for last-minute purchases of coffee and local treats.

days.intro: Say goodbye to Puerto Rico with final moments and smooth travel back to Philadelphia.

morning.name: Hotel Checkout
morning.desc: Pack up and prepare for departure.

morning.name: Final Coffee at Café Cuatro Sombras
morning.desc: Last taste of Puerto Rican coffee before leaving.

morning.name: Airport Transfer
morning.desc: Taxi or rideshare to Luis Muñoz Marín International Airport.

afternoon.name: Airport Arrival
afternoon.desc: Check in for flight and go through security.

afternoon.name: Departure Flight
afternoon.desc: Fly back to Philadelphia with wonderful memories.

evening.name: Arrive Philadelphia
evening.desc: Land back home after an amazing Puerto Rican adventure.

days.tip: Arrive at the airport 2 hours early for domestic flights and keep important documents easily accessible for check-in.

food.intro: San Juan's culinary scene brilliantly blends traditional Puerto Rican flavors with international influences and excellent vegetarian options.
food.tip: Tipping 18-20% is standard at restaurants, and many places add automatic gratuity for parties of 6 or more.

neighborhoods.name: Isla Verde
neighborhoods.whyStay: Best beaches and easy airport access

hotels.tip: Book accommodations in advance during peak season (December-April) and consider LGBTQ+-friendly certified properties for the most welcoming experience.

getYourGuide.name: El Yunque Rainforest Adventure
getYourGuide.desc: Full day guided tour including waterfalls and hiking trails with transportation.

getYourGuide.name: Bioluminescent Bay Kayaking
getYourGuide.desc: Night tour to witness the magical glowing waters of Mosquito Bay.

getYourGuide.name: Old San Juan Food Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Culinary walking tour featuring traditional Puerto Rican dishes and local restaurants.

hiddenGems.name: Cueva Ventana
hiddenGems.desc: Cave with spectacular valley views accessible by guided tour only.

hiddenGems.name: Mosquito Bay Vieques
hiddenGems.desc: World's brightest bioluminescent bay requiring ferry trip to Vieques island.

hiddenGems.name: Casa Blanca Gardens
hiddenGems.desc: Peaceful historic gardens overlooking San Juan Bay with minimal crowds.

packing.title: April in San Juan, Puerto Rico
packing.intro: Pack for warm tropical weather with occasional rain showers and plenty of outdoor activities.
packing.luggage: A medium suitcase plus small backpack for day trips works perfectly for a week in Puerto Rico.
